ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the game was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game (e.g., platformer, RPG) */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode (e.g., single-player, multi-player) */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Current version of the game */,
  "game_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the game */,
  "game_price" REAL /* Price of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance metric */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being assessed */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the game among peers */,
  "percent" TEXT /* Percentage of players achieving a score */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by players */,
  "site_pts" REAL /* Site-specific points attributed to the game */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the game */,
  "player_count" INTEGER /* Number of active players */,
  "average_session_time" INTEGER /* Average time spent playing the game per session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site (e.g., gaming platform) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "site_url" TEXT /* URL of the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the player registered on the platform */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the player's account */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player scoring points */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game played */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was recorded */,
  "level_reached" INTEGER /* Highest level reached by the player */,
  "time_to_complete" INTEGER /* Time taken to complete the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_scores_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_scores_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer or studio */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the developer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the developer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the developer is based */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the developer was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "sub_genre" TEXT /* Sub-genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being ranked */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the game on the specified date */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the rank was recorded */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank since the previous recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ranks_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Admin, Developer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the game is hosted */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game available on the site */,
  "availability_date" TEXT /* Date when the game became available on the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id", "game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_access_history" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being accessed */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player accessing the game */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was accessed */,
  "playtime" INTEGER /* Time spent playing the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_access_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_access_history_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being reviewed */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player writing the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the player (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_patches" (
  "patch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patch */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being patched */,
  "patch_date" TEXT /* Date when the patch was released */,
  "patch_notes" TEXT /* Text of the patch notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_patches_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game winning the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_awards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
